title: Elbaf’s Hidden Corners
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Usopp as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What do you think it is?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ha ha! I figured you, of all people, would appreciate it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why would there be a facility like this in a country of warriors?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was just thinking I'd like to show you this place later!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's good we found you. There was a horn blast earlier, so the woods might not be safe right now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In any case, this facility really is stunning!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I estimate that it's been here for at least 3000 years!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What?! How did you calculate that?! there's no way it's that old!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We can't really refute that claim.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Honestly, even we locals aren't sure about the origins of this building.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think I'll make myself at home here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, I'm gonna check it out for myself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: what I find most scary THUNDER

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Elbaf's just full of crazy stuff, huh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What kind of creature is that?!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
